prose:
Method–provenance summary (reproducible):
Property: frontier-orbital energies (HOMO, LUMO, HOMO–LUMO gap)
Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` ⇒ B3LYP/def2-TZVP with RI (density fitting) in PySCF
Geometry provenance: single-point on the Cartesian coordinates supplied in /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz (no re-optimization)
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent)
Charge = 0, multiplicity = 1 (closed-shell singlet, RHF/RKS)
Software/backend: PySCF (called through chemkit frontier-orbitals skill; see CLI below)
Convergence & caveats: SCF converged in 7 cycles; no warnings reported by the engine. All integrity checks passed (`integrity.status = ok`, `trustworthy = true`).
CLI invocation (reproducible command):
/…/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmprdqs6o9h/live.json
(The live PySCF output was streamed during the run to the automatically generated frontier-orbitals .out log in the current working directory; it can be inspected for full SCF details.)

Results (gas-phase, B3LYP/def2-TZVP):
• HOMO energy = −8.603 718 3 eV
• LUMO energy =  +0.336 950 37 eV
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 8.940 668 7 eV (headline value)

No warnings were emitted by the chemkit engine for this run.

Provenance: computed (DFT single-point); no experimental comparison requested.
